stemHtml: To obtain the instantaneous position from the accelerations:

options.a: integrating twice acceleration with respect to time is sufficient.
options.b: it is necessary to integrate twice the acceleration with respect to time, and to know the initial position only.
options.c: it is necessary to integrate twice the acceleration with respect to time, and to know the initial speed only.
options.d: it is necessary to integrate twice the acceleration with respect to time, and to know the initial position and the initial speed.
